query: What are the top AI news headlines today? Include sources.
textResponse:
Here are some of the **top AI-related headlines for today, Thursday, April 9, 2026**, based on recent reporting and official company posts:

1. **OpenAI says enterprise AI is accelerating fast**
   - OpenAI published a new note from its Chief Revenue Officer saying enterprise now makes up **more than 40% of OpenAI’s revenue**, with usage of Codex and API traffic also growing sharply. That makes enterprise adoption one of today’s biggest AI business stories. ([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/next-phase-of-enterprise-ai/?utm_source=openai))

2. **OpenAI pushes new AI policy agenda**
   - In a fresh policy post this week, OpenAI argued for an “industrial policy for the Intelligence Age,” including fellowships, research grants, and a new Washington, D.C. workshop to shape AI policy discussions. ([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/industrial-policy-for-the-intelligence-age?utm_source=openai))

3. **Major AI outlets are still tracking a very active news cycle today**
   - The Guardian’s AI news hub shows active AI coverage published **today, April 9**, indicating continuing same-day developments worth watching across policy, companies, and products. ([theguardian.com](https://www.theguardian.com/technology/artificialintelligenceai/2026/apr/09/all?utm_source=openai))

4. **OpenAI and Microsoft’s partnership remains a major AI business storyline**
   - A recent joint statement from the two companies said OpenAI’s new funding and partnerships **do not change** the existing Microsoft–OpenAI relationship, underscoring that alliance as one of the central industry stories this month. ([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/continuing-microsoft-partnership/?utm_source=openai))

5. **TechCrunch continues to frame 2026 as a year of big AI deals, product moves, and political pressure**
   - TechCrunch’s March 2026 roundup highlights that the year’s biggest AI stories so far include acquisitions, product controversies, and high-stakes negotiations—useful context for today’s headlines. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/13/the-biggest-ai-stories-of-the-year-so-far/?utm_source=openai))

**Sources**
- OpenAI: “The next phase of enterprise AI” ([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/next-phase-of-enterprise-ai/?utm_source=openai))
- OpenAI: “Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age” ([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/industrial-policy-for-the-intelligence-age?utm_source=openai))
- OpenAI / Microsoft: “Joint Statement from OpenAI and Microsoft” ([openai.com](https://openai.com/index/continuing-microsoft-partnership/?utm_source=openai))
- The Guardian AI topic page for April 9, 2026 ([theguardian.com](https://www.theguardian.com/technology/artificialintelligenceai/2026/apr/09/all?utm_source=openai))
- TechCrunch: “The biggest AI stories of the year (so far)” ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/13/the-biggest-ai-stories-of-the-year-so-far/?utm_source=openai))

- **Top 5 headlines**
- **Why each matters**
